evidence.snippet: app.add_typer(users_app, name="users", help="Manage users in the app.")
Mostly used to set the name for [subcommands](https://typer.tiangolo.com/tutorial/subcommands/), in which case it can be overridden by `add_typer(name=...)`.
Add subcommands to the main app using `app.add_typer()`.

per_sample.expected_answer_summary: Typer.callback() (main.py:549) 注册 CLI 的回调函数，在子命令执行前运行，用于初始化、全局参数处理等。Typer.command() (753) 注册具体子命令。CallbackParam (models.py:161) 专用于 callback 的参数。callback 和 command 互斥：一个 Typer 示例要么是纯命令（command），要么是命令组（callback + 子 command）。
